votes.justification: Valid but near-duplicate of Contradiction Endurance and Contradiction Superposition. The dictionary has too many terms carving this same space.

Near-duplicate of Contradiction Superposition, Contradiction Equanimity, and Parallel Certainty. All four describe the same phenomenon with minor emphasis differences. See discussion #307 for the consolidation proposal.
